configs.body: Create your Men's brackets today and get ready for the big reveal on Sunday!
configs.subject: Bracket Reveal is on Sunday!

configs.body: The Men's bracket is live! Fill out up to 25 and create a group to play with friends and family.
configs.subject: The Men's Bracket is Live!

configs.body: The Men's tourney tips off tomorrow - don't miss out! Create up to 25 brackets today.
configs.subject: The Men's Bracket Locks Tomorrow!

text.description: The Women's tourney is still open for signups!
text.title: Create a Women’s Bracket

text.name: Allstate
text.optInCheckboxText: Enter the 2026 Allstate Tourney Challenge Sweepstakes for a chance to win a $5,000 gift card. You agree ESPN may share your info, including your name and email, with Allstate for their independent use in accordance with Allstate’s Privacy Statement.

text.name: Coors Light
text.optInCheckboxText: Enter the 2026 Coors Light® March Hoops: Tourney Challenge Sweepstakes for a chance to win $30,000. You must be 21+, and agree ESPN will share your name and email with Coors Light, for their independent use in accordance with Molson Coors’ Privacy Policy.

text.bracketChampionPickPhrase: Congrats! Your Pick To Cut The Nets Down Is: <% championPickName %>
text.description: Welcome back to the #1 Men's bracket game! The tourney tips off Thursday, 3/19 @ 12:15p ET - don't get locked out, create your brackets today! Don't forget to create a group and invite your friends to share in the madness.
text.descriptionShortLock: Use BracketCast to follow the live scores and track your brackets throughout the tourney!
text.descriptionShortPreLock: Create up to 25 brackets! FREE to play.
text.groupOpenGraphDescription: You've been invited to join a group and play <% businessUnit %>'s <% challengeName %>
text.groupsOpenGraphDescription: Join a group to compete in <% businessUnit %>'s <% challengeName %> against friends and family for FREE.
text.howToPlayOpenGraphDescription: Check out the How to Play, Prizes, FAQ and Rules of <% businessUnit %>'s <% challengeName %>
text.leaderboardOpenGraphDescription: See how the best brackets are doing in <% businessUnit %>'s <% challengeName %>
text.makePicksOpenGraphDescription: Play <% businessUnit %>'s <% challengeName %> for FREE and create your brackets.
text.prize: $125,000. Fill out 25 brackets to be eligible for special prizes!
text.welcomeScreenHeroSubTextComplete: Win prizes playing ESPN's other free to play games all year long!
text.welcomeScreenHeroSubTextLocked: Use BracketCast to follow the live scores!
text.welcomeScreenHeroSubTextPreLock: Sign up now to play the #1 Men's bracket game for FREE! $125,000 in prizes.
text.mmLiveCopy: Watch every NCAA Tournament game live!
text.noEntriesSubtitleComplete: The tourney has ended. Thank you for your interest in <% challengeName %>.
text.noEntriesSubtitleLander: The tourney is just around the corner. Get ahead of the game and create a bracket now!
text.noEntriesSubtitleLocked: The tourney is underway and signups have closed. Check out the live bracket to follow the action.
text.noEntriesSubtitlePreLock: The tourney field is set. Create up to <% challengeMaxEntries %> brackets today!

tiebreakQuestions.question: How many total points will be scored in the Championship Game?
